positive: A stylized illustration of a whimsical, bioluminescent forest scene viewed from above, featuring interconnected root systems forming an ethereal network. The main subject is a stylized stag skull gently nestled amongst oversized, luminous flora (ferns, lily pads, glowing mushrooms). Use deep indigo and emerald tones contrasted with glowing teal and cyan highlights. The style should be clean, graphic, and inspired by Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock prints mixed with modern flat vector art. Strong silhouettes, high contrast, and intricate line work are essential. Central composition, suitable for textile printing, minimal negative space. Perfect symmetry desired.
